matching_notes: requires means the selected inputs must include all listed values.
useful_when means the command is still useful in those contexts, but not mandatory.
services, attack_types, and target_types are filters/scoring fields.
target_types describe the command target/source, not where the command is executed.
Empty target_types means target-agnostic or target not known yet.
executor is metadata for runner platform only and should not be rendered as an OS tag.
Use Linux only for Linux targets, Windows only for Windows targets, and ActiveDirectory for domain/DC/AD targets.
